title: Ladies to Board
writer: Donald W. Lee, William Dudley Pelley
actors: Tom Mix, Gertrude Olmstead, Philo McCullough
plot: A little old lady dies, leaving her estate, consisting of a sanitarium for aging ladies, to Tom Faxton, a young man who rescued her when her automobile went out of control. At the rest home he meets Edith Oliver and woos her away ...
